title: Hetaeria tetraptera
taxonomy: Hetaeria tetraptera is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Cranichideae. At the genus level, Hetaeria tetraptera is placed alongside other species under the genus Hetaeria. The species is further distinguished within the genus based on its unique characteristics and features. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the orchid family.
